summary: Platform Hardening Layer (Iteration 71) - Comprehensive testing of all 16 backend API endpoints and 11 frontend tabs. All 17 backend tests passed. All 11 frontend tabs (Overview, Traffic, Workers, Observability, Performance, Tenants, Secrets, Playbooks, Scaling, DR, Checklist) render correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with clear separation of concerns across 10 hardening modules
All endpoints properly require authentication with role-based access control
Frontend uses proper data-testid attributes for all tabs enabling robust testing
seed_data_creation: None - hardening endpoints return configuration data and run audits/simulations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Platform Hardening Layer fully tested. All 10 parts implemented: (1) Supplier Traffic Testing with sandbox/shadow/canary modes for Paximum/Amadeus/AviationStack, (2) Worker Deployment Strategy with 5 Celery pools and DLQ config, (3) Observability Stack with 17 Prometheus metrics and 4 Grafana dashboards, (4) Performance Testing with 3 load profiles and 7 SLA targets, (5) Multi-Tenant Safety with 20+ collection audit showing 100% isolation score, (6) Secret Management with 9 secrets inventory (4 configured), (7) Incident Playbooks for supplier_outage/queue_backlog/payment_failure, (8) Auto-Scaling Strategy with 4 component configs, (9) Disaster Recovery with 3 scenarios and drill schedules, (10) Hardening Checklist with 50 tasks showing 3.15/10 maturity. Dashboard at /app/admin/platform-hardening.
